{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321214210A93C8A866193C2447D81"}"},"total":92},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7609928060911993625","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"曾悦篇有感：我本可以忍受黑暗，如果我从未见过光明。洛白你坏事做尽[重拳出击]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771827985,"group_id":"7502062387860606014","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1961128272079807"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7502062387860606014","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":25962,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7596375544797627161","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好，追完了，来写书评。主观上，这本书我感觉角色塑造是本书的优点，每个角色都很鲜明。目前的主线剧情比较流畅，但是中间关于雪梨的回忆和主线衔接得不够好，其他角色的剧情有点散。文笔方面我不太懂，不做评价。然后还有几点补充：
主角纯cs；
i涵TV你们赢了；
复活赛何时开打，我要看病娇狠狠拷打洛白口牙"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768673478,"group_id":"7502062387860606014","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"若非你心中的结局，改写它","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9iYrXLerOT+ft+esyQ04eWJWODaS7SDpft0ovVvVWOG","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1961128272079807","user_name":"佚名UMT"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1961128272079807","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7502062387860606014","book_info":{"abstract":"她们是世界的宠儿，命运的骄子。天道为每位气运之女都书写了完美的结局，却忘了赋予她们与之相配的灵魂与过程。
而洛白，是这个世界唯一的变数。
作为天道选定的唯一反派，洛白深知传统反派的套路——与天命之女为敌者，不会有什么好下场。
所以百年来，他独创了一套让女主成长的法则：
当她们需要挫折时，我成为那块绊脚石；
当她们需要觉悟时，我扮演那个恶人；
当她们需要蜕变时...我便成为那个必须被“失去”的人。
直到那一天……
洛白第一次遇到了EX级的女主。
“老实了老实了家人们...”
【本书有且多病娇，但不是那种动不动就伤人囚禁的病娇，多半是伤害自己的，那种伤人囚禁的病娇也有，不过前期不会出现】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/358cfa3422b194ee13bfb587670d90b6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"六花酱第四小号","author_id":"","book_id":"7502062387860606014","book_name":"对于依赖型病娇，我从不手软","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3063人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7502093701569593918","read_count":"3063","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"372895"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.3","serial_count":"179","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,都市异能,系统,多女主,反派","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/af0495a54b06ce7ab8b18ce7de91a548~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779284530&x-signature=aO3zHdWoqH8%2FFhgbWlCHbnJpgmQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1377011813861832","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"101"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321214210A93C8A866193C2447D81"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":
